title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Daniel Plant 26 June 2025
body: "This Order is made in relation to a complaint that Mr Plant, in his role as liquidator of a company, breached the Fundamental Principle of Professional Competence and Due Care of the Insolvency Code of Ethics, when he:   Failed to respond to correspondence from the company’s pensions administrator; and Failed to ensure complete and accurate Forms RP15 and RP15A were submitted to the Redundancy Payments Service as appropriate prior to the closure of the case.   Accordingly, Mr Plant was found liable to disciplinary action under the IPA’s Articles of Association. "
